title: Viewing multiple timelines
excerpt: I am creating my first boards to manage my projects and I would like to be able to view the timelines for certain items  in one view, preferably in Gantt. I have not yet worked out how to do this so any advise would be g…

posts.author: WestwoodDave (dave suddaby)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating my first boards to manage my projects and I would like to be able to view the timelines for certain items in one view, preferably in Gantt. I have not yet worked out how to do this so any advise would be greatly appreciated
Many thanks
Dave

posts.author: gscherf (Greg Scherf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dave,
Unless I am missing something use a dashboard and select the Gantt widget. You will be able to select the boards you want and then filter for the items you need.

Greg

posts.author: WestwoodDave (dave suddaby)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the reply Greg, I have found that if I open a project dashboard, it automatically sets up a Gantt and all I have to do is to adjust the settings to include the items I need. So your advice is bang on, I tried to set it up form scratch and it was a hard way round it.

Many thanks
Dave
